evals.prompt: Draw a 16x16 pixel art frog and save it as frog.svg
evals.expected_output: A 16x16 pixel art frog rendered as an SVG file. Should be visually recognizable as a frog with appropriate green colors, eyes, and body shape.

assertions.text: An SVG file named frog.svg exists in the outputs directory
assertions.name: svg_file_exists

assertions.text: The SVG contains a shape-rendering='crispEdges' attribute (pixel-perfect rendering)
assertions.name: crispedges_attribute

assertions.text: The SVG contains green-family colors appropriate for a frog (e.g. #3a7d44, #228b22, #90ee90, or similar)
assertions.name: green_colors_present

assertions.text: The SVG has viewBox or width/height set to render at a reasonable size (>100px)
assertions.name: reasonable_display_size

assertions.text: The pixel grid is exactly 16x16 (the coordinate system spans 0-15 in both axes)
assertions.name: correct_canvas_size

evals.prompt: Make a 32x32 pixel art mushroom — red cap with white dots, Super Mario style. Save as mushroom.svg
evals.expected_output: A 32x32 pixel art mushroom with a red cap, white dots, and a cream/white stem. Should evoke the classic Super Mario mushroom.

assertions.text: An SVG file named mushroom.svg exists in the outputs directory
assertions.name: svg_file_exists

assertions.text: The SVG contains red colors for the cap (e.g. #cc0000, #ff0000, #e00000, or similar)
assertions.name: red_cap_colors

assertions.text: The SVG contains white or near-white colors for dots (#ffffff, #f0f0f0, or similar)
assertions.name: white_dot_colors

assertions.text: The pixel grid is exactly 32x32 (coordinates span 0-31 in both axes)
assertions.name: correct_canvas_size

assertions.text: The SVG contains shape-rendering='crispEdges' for pixel-perfect rendering
assertions.name: crispedges_attribute

evals.prompt: Draw a pixel art sword icon (16x16). The sword should be diagonal, pointing top-right, with a silver blade, gold crossguard, and brown handle. Save as sword.svg
evals.expected_output: A 16x16 pixel art sword icon, diagonal orientation (pointing top-right), with distinct blade, crossguard, and handle sections using appropriate colors.

assertions.text: An SVG file named sword.svg exists in the outputs directory
assertions.name: svg_file_exists

assertions.text: The SVG contains silver/grey colors for the blade (#aaaaaa, #cccccc, #c0c0c0, #888888, or similar)
assertions.name: silver_blade_colors

assertions.text: The SVG contains gold/yellow colors for the crossguard (#f4d03f, #ffd700, #daa520, or similar)
assertions.name: gold_crossguard_colors
